items.title: 'Every drop of water counts': Fear for the future of Argentina's glaciers
items.dek: A controversial law to remove protections for the country's glaciers has passed, opening the doors for mining.
items.body: A controversial law to remove protections for the country's glaciers has passed, opening the doors for mining.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: An inappropriate joke nearly ended his career. Now he's back with more humour
items.dek: A misfired joke nearly derailed Samay Raina’s comedy career. Now he’s back, reclaiming his voice.
items.body: A misfired joke nearly derailed Samay Raina’s comedy career. Now he’s back, reclaiming his voice.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Trump has handed JD Vance his most difficult mission yet
items.dek: As the US vice-president leads peace talks with Iran, he must balance warring factions, a demanding boss and his own political future.
items.body: As the US vice-president leads peace talks with Iran, he must balance warring factions, a demanding boss and his own political future.
items.author: IriLine Desk
